interface.shortDescription: Local Cities: Skylines II mayoral analysis
interface.longDescription: Cities2 Chief of Staff helps Codex brief the mayor using local city evidence from Save Investigator, Cities2-DataExport, and Cities2-InfoLoomBridge when available.
defaultPrompt: Brief me on my city like the mayor.
